title: Viewing subitems headers when scrolling down
excerpt:
When making a lot of sub-items and then scrolling down in the Desktop App on MacOS, hides the header for the sub-items that tells what is what in each column. 
The header with column names for sub-items should be sticky …

posts.author: rolf (Rolf-Ørjan)
posts.cookedHtml:
When making a lot of sub-items and then scrolling down in the Desktop App on MacOS, hides the header for the sub-items that tells what is what in each column.

The header with column names for sub-items should be sticky and stay at the top, as it’s impossible to see what info you’re going to put where.

Now the header just scrolls behind the header of the parent structure, and it’s very confusing.
